description: Special interest: wheelchair user, full accessibility required throughout
query: I am travelling with my partner from Munich to Barcelona from September 5th to 10th, 2026. I am a wheelchair user and need full accessibility throughout — wheelchair-accessible flights and seating, a hotel with a roll-in shower and lift access, and activities reachable by wheelchair. Budget is €4,000. We love Gaudí architecture, accessible beaches, and local food. Please plan a fully accessible trip.

hard_constraints.accommodation: fully accessible hotel with roll-in shower and lift
hard_constraints.interests: Gaudí architecture, accessible beaches, local food, accessible museums

travelplan.title: Fully accessible Barcelona trip for 2 from Munich, 5–10 September 2026

slots.name: Direct flight Munich → Barcelona: Vueling VY1817
slots.description: Direct evening flight for 2 adults. Contact Vueling at booking and at least 48 hours before departure to request wheelchair assistance, aisle chair/boarding support if needed, and accessible seating. Confirm personal wheelchair battery/type handling if applicable.
slots.location: Munich Airport MUC to Barcelona-El Prat BCN
slots.notes: Cost shown as outbound half of €328 round-trip total for 2.

slots.name: Pre-booked adapted taxi / Eurotaxi to hotel
slots.description: Door-to-door accessible transfer from BCN arrivals to ILUNION Barcelona. Eurotaxi/adapted taxi is recommended at this late arrival to avoid Metro transfers and ensure ramp-equipped vehicle availability.
slots.location: Barcelona-El Prat Airport to Hotel ILUNION Barcelona
slots.notes: Routing API unavailable; time is a conservative late-night buffer based on airport-to-city taxi estimates.

slots.name: Check in: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona accessible room
slots.description: Check into an accessible room requested with roll-in shower, grab rails, fold-down shower seat, emergency pull cord, lift access and step-free public areas. Confirm room type directly with hotel in writing before booking.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona, Carrer de Ramon Turró, 196-198, 08005 Barcelona
slots.notes: Hotel stay cost is entered as one consolidated lodging slot on Day 2.

slots.name: Pre-flight accessible lunch in Munich
slots.description: Accessible lunch in Munich before heading to the airport. Choose a familiar step-free restaurant or airport-area option; keep the day low-stress before evening departure.
slots.location: Munich, Germany
slots.notes: Specific restaurant depends on where you start in Munich; verify step-free entrance and accessible WC.

slots.name: Accessible dinner at Munich Airport before boarding
slots.description: Dinner after check-in/security in a step-free airport area. Munich Airport Terminal 2/MAC have elevators, accessible restrooms and PRM support; choose the restaurant closest to the assigned Vueling check-in/gate.
slots.location: Munich Airport Terminal 2 / Munich Airport Center
slots.notes: Request PRM assistance at least 48 hours before travel; arrive early for boarding support.

slots.name: Accessible hotel stay: ILUNION Barcelona, 5 nights
slots.description: Five-night stay in an adapted room. ILUNION Barcelona is reported to have 9 adapted rooms, step-free entrance, elevators, roll-in showers with fold-down seats and grab rails, and accessible public facilities.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona, Carrer de Ramon Turró, 196-198, 08005 Barcelona
slots.notes: Estimated at €250/night x 5. Live hotel API failed; final rate and adapted-room availability must be confirmed before booking.

slots.name: Hotel breakfast and access check
slots.description: Unhurried breakfast and confirmation with reception of lift routes, adapted room features, taxi booking support, and nearest step-free L4 Metro station access.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona
slots.notes: Ask reception to pre-book adapted taxis for Park Güell and airport return.

slots.name: Sagrada Família accessible visit
slots.description: Gaudí basilica visit via Entrance B on Carrer de la Marina. Main nave, museum and shop are step-free; towers are not accessible for wheelchair users. Book disabled visitor + companion ticket in advance and bring disability documentation.
slots.location: Sagrada Família, C/ de Mallorca, 401, 08013 Barcelona
slots.notes: September hours typically 09:00–20:00; 2026 final calendar pending.

slots.name: Accessible taxi / Metro transfer to Sagrada Família
slots.description: Use step-free L4/L2 route only if elevators are confirmed operational; otherwise use an adapted taxi. Sagrada Família station and basilica Entrance B are reported accessible.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona to Sagrada Família Entrance B, Carrer de la Marina
slots.notes: Allow extra buffer for elevator checks.

slots.name: Lunch: Casa Amàlia
slots.description: Moderately priced Catalan lunch in Eixample. Confirm step-free entrance and accessible restroom when booking.
slots.location: Casa Amàlia, Ptge. del Mercat, 14, Eixample, 08009 Barcelona
slots.notes: Restaurant returned by restaurant search; accessibility must be reconfirmed directly.

slots.name: Transfer to Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau
slots.description: Short transfer to Sant Pau. Use accessible taxi if sidewalks/crowds are tiring after Sagrada Família.
slots.location: Casa Amàlia to Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau
slots.notes: Routing API unavailable; transfer time includes buffer.

slots.name: Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau accessible Modernisme visit
slots.description: Step-free modernist hospital complex with wide paved avenues, gardens, elevators and accessible routes through restored pavilions and tunnels.
slots.location: Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau, Carrer de Sant Antoni Maria Claret, 167, Barcelona
slots.notes: Estimated entry for 2; confirm any disability discounts and elevator routes.

slots.name: Dinner: Vivo Tapas
slots.description: Highly rated tapas dinner in Eixample at moderate price level. Confirm step-free access and accessible restroom at reservation.
slots.location: Vivo Tapas, Carrer del Rosselló, 255, Eixample, 08008 Barcelona
slots.notes: Local tapas focus.

slots.name: Adapted taxi back to hotel
slots.description: Door-to-door adapted taxi back to ILUNION Barcelona to avoid late-evening elevator uncertainty.
slots.location: Vivo Tapas to Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Hotel breakfast
slots.description: Breakfast at the hotel to keep the morning low-stress before Park Güell’s hilly terrain.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Pre-booked adapted taxi to Park Güell accessible entrance
slots.description: Use adapted taxi to Carretera del Carmel entrance; avoid Lesseps/Vallcarca Metro approaches because of steep uphill routes.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona to Park Güell, Carretera del Carmel entrance
slots.notes: Route timing estimate is buffered because routing API was unavailable.

slots.name: Accessible taxi to lunch
slots.description: Adapted taxi from Park Güell to lunch to avoid steep Gràcia/Park Güell gradients.
slots.location: Park Güell to Ca l'Estevet

slots.name: Lunch: Ca l'Estevet
slots.description: Traditional Catalan lunch at a moderate price level. Confirm step-free entrance and accessible restroom before reserving.
slots.location: Ca l'Estevet, Carrer de Valldonzella, 46, 08001 Barcelona
slots.notes: Restaurant search returned it as Catalan option; not in Gràcia, but accessible taxi makes routing manageable.

slots.name: Park Güell accessible Gaudí route
slots.description: Enter via Carretera del Carmel and follow the reduced-mobility architectural route, avoiding the Dragon Stairway. Book disabled visitor + companion ticket in advance; two wheelchairs may be reserved on-site.
slots.location: Park Güell, Carretera del Carmel, 23, 08024 Barcelona
slots.notes: Free entry often available for disabled visitor plus companion with advance booking and documentation.

slots.name: Casa Vicens accessible Gaudí visit
slots.description: Gaudí’s first major house, reported fully wheelchair accessible with ramped side entrance and internal lift to all floors including rooftop. Bring headphones for mobile audio guide.
slots.location: Casa Vicens, Carrer de les Carolines, 20-26, 08012 Barcelona
slots.notes: Book official timed entry; estimated €20 x 2 before disability discounts.

slots.name: Dinner: Colom Restaurant
slots.description: Mediterranean/Catalan dinner at moderate price. Confirm step-free access and accessible restroom at reservation.
slots.location: Colom Restaurant, Carrer dels Escudellers, 33, Ciutat Vella, 08002 Barcelona

slots.name: Adapted taxi back to hotel
slots.description: Door-to-door transfer back to ILUNION Barcelona.
slots.location: Colom Restaurant to Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Hotel breakfast
slots.description: Breakfast at hotel before beach day; ask reception to reconfirm current assisted bathing service hours.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Nova Icària accessible beach assisted bathing
slots.description: Accessible beach time using wooden walkways, adapted changing/toilet facilities, amphibious chairs and municipal assisted bathing staff when operating. September service is typically daytime/shoulder-season; reconfirm 2026 schedule shortly before travel.
slots.location: Nova Icària Beach, Passeig Marítim de la Nova Icària, Barcelona
slots.notes: Free public beach and assisted bathing equipment.

slots.name: Accessible seafront roll: Port Olímpic to Poblenou
slots.description: Gentle promenade roll along the accessible seafront, using ramps and paved promenade sections. Stop for shade and rest as needed.
slots.location: Port Olímpic / Passeig Marítim / Poblenou seafront
slots.notes: Avoid sand; use promenade and official beach access points.

slots.name: Rest at hotel / rooftop accessible facilities
slots.description: Cool-down/rest period at the accessible hotel. The hotel is reported to offer elevators to public areas and accessible facilities; confirm pool lift availability if planning to use it.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Dinner: Mar i Terra Rambla
slots.description: Mediterranean/Catalan dinner at moderate price. Confirm step-free access and accessible restroom before booking.
slots.location: Mar i Terra Rambla, Rambla de Catalunya, 80, Eixample, 08008 Barcelona

slots.name: Adapted taxi back to hotel
slots.description: Door-to-door return transfer to avoid late-evening transit uncertainty.
slots.location: Mar i Terra Rambla to Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Lunch: La Marea seafood
slots.description: Seafood/Mediterranean lunch near the beach at a moderate price. Confirm step-free entry and accessible restroom when reserving.
slots.location: La Marea, Passeig de Garcia Fària, 33, Sant Martí, 08005 Barcelona

slots.name: Roll/walk to Nova Icària accessible beach area
slots.description: Use the seafront/Poblenou accessible pavement route toward Nova Icària/Bogatell beach infrastructure. The hotel is close to accessible beach zones; choose taxi if heat or pavement conditions are poor.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona to Nova Icària Beach
slots.notes: Exact routing unavailable; web sources indicate nearby accessible beach infrastructure.

days.label: Passeig de Gràcia Gaudí icons and tapas

slots.name: Hotel breakfast
slots.description: Hotel breakfast before a concentrated Passeig de Gràcia architecture day.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Accessible Metro/taxi to Passeig de Gràcia
slots.description: Use step-free L4 to Passeig de Gràcia only if elevators are confirmed working; otherwise take adapted taxi.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona to Passeig de Gràcia
slots.notes: Buffer included for elevator checks.

slots.name: Casa Batlló accessible visit
slots.description: Gaudí house visit with priority elevator access for wheelchair users, accessible main interior, Gaudí Dome/Cube experiences and adapted restrooms. Rooftop/Dragon’s Back may not be fully wheelchair accessible due to architectural steps. Book timed reduced-mobility tickets.
slots.location: Casa Batlló, Passeig de Gràcia, 43, 08007 Barcelona
slots.notes: Estimated general entry for 2; disability discount may reduce cost.

slots.name: Casa Amatller accessible Modernisme visit
slots.description: Step-free visit next door to Casa Batlló. Main/Noble Floor and museum areas are accessible; photography studio is not wheelchair accessible. Good quieter contrast to Gaudí’s Casa Batlló.
slots.location: Casa Amatller, Passeig de Gràcia, 41, 08007 Barcelona
slots.notes: Estimated €20 x 2.

slots.name: Lunch: El Tros de La Rambla
slots.description: Catalan lunch close to Passeig de Gràcia at moderate price. Confirm step-free access and accessible restroom when reserving.
slots.location: El Tros de La Rambla, Rambla de Catalunya, 70, Eixample, 08007 Barcelona

slots.name: Accessible Passeig de Gràcia architecture roll
slots.description: Gentle pavement-based architecture route along Passeig de Gràcia to view façades, benches, and Modernista details without needing additional interior access.
slots.location: Passeig de Gràcia, Barcelona
slots.notes: Keep to broad pavements and avoid peak crowd pinch points.

slots.name: Rest at hotel
slots.description: Rest and prepare for final dinner; reconfirm next morning adapted taxi to airport and Aena PRM assistance.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona
slots.notes: Ask reception to book ramp-equipped taxi for 04:45.

slots.name: Dinner: Bodega Biarritz 1881
slots.description: Catalan tapas dinner at moderate price. Confirm step-free access and accessible restroom before booking; if not suitable, use Vivo Tapas as backup.
slots.location: Bodega Biarritz 1881, Carrer Nou de Sant Francesc, 7, 08002 Barcelona
slots.notes: Wednesday closures can occur in current hours; reconfirm 2026 opening before final booking.

slots.name: Adapted taxi back to hotel
slots.description: Door-to-door adapted taxi for final evening return.
slots.location: Bodega Biarritz 1881 to Hotel ILUNION Barcelona

slots.name: Check out and adapted taxi to BCN airport
slots.description: Early check-out and pre-booked ramp-equipped taxi to BCN. Arrive about 2 hours before departure to allow Aena PRM assistance from check-in/security to aircraft seat.
slots.location: Hotel ILUNION Barcelona to Barcelona-El Prat Airport
slots.notes: Confirm 04:45 pickup with hotel the night before.

slots.name: Aena PRM assistance and airport breakfast buffer
slots.description: Use official free PRM assistance at BCN, requested at least 48 hours in advance. If time permits, use accessible airport café/restaurant in Terminal 1 airside/landside.
slots.location: Barcelona-El Prat Airport
slots.notes: Airport restaurants and PRM service are accessible; exact gate/terminal depends on airline assignment.

slots.name: Accessible arrival snack / lunch buffer at Munich Airport
slots.description: Optional accessible post-flight snack/lunch buffer at Munich Airport before onward travel. Käfer Bistro Terminal 2 and MAC facilities are reported step-free with lifts nearby.
slots.location: Munich Airport Terminal 2 / Munich Airport Center
slots.notes: Optional; can be skipped if onward transport is arranged.

slots.name: Direct flight Barcelona → Munich: Vueling VY1812
slots.description: Direct return flight for 2 adults. Confirm wheelchair assistance, accessible seating, boarding support, and wheelchair handling with Vueling and Aena before travel.
slots.location: Barcelona-El Prat BCN to Munich Airport MUC
slots.notes: Cost shown as return half of €328 round-trip total for 2.

slots.name: Munich Airport PRM assistance and accessible arrival
slots.description: Use Munich Airport PRM/mobility service for deplaning, wheelchair return, baggage and accessible terminal exit. Service is free under EU rules when requested in advance.
slots.location: Munich Airport MUC
slots.notes: Accessible restrooms and elevators are available throughout Terminal 2/MAC.

validation_feedback:
The itinerary successfully meets all hard constraints and task requirements. It provides a fully wheelchair-accessible plan for two travelers from Munich to Barcelona within the €4,000 budget (estimated at €2,980). 

Key highlights of compliance:
- **Accessibility:** The itinerary includes a hotel (ILUNION Barcelona) known for roll-in showers and lift access. It utilizes adapted taxis (Eurotaxis) and accessible flight procedures (Vueling + Aena PRM assistance). Activities like Sagrada Família, Park Güell (via the Carretera del Carmel entrance), and Casa Vicens are specifically chosen for their accessibility features.
- **Interests:** Gaudí architecture, accessible beaches (Nova Icària), and local food are all integrated.
- **Logistics:** Travel dates (Sept 5-10, 2026) are respected, and the schedule accounts for the necessary buffer times for PRM assistance at airports.

task_list.name: flight_search
task_list.text: Find wheelchair-accessible flights from Munich (MUC) to Barcelona (BCN) for 2 people, departing Sept 5 and returning Sept 10, 2026, ensuring options for accessible seating.

task_list.name: hotel_search
task_list.text: Search for hotels in Barcelona with a roll-in shower, lift access, and full wheelchair accessibility for 5 nights within the €4,000 total trip budget.

task_list.name: gaudi_attractions
task_list.text: Identify Gaudí architecture sites in Barcelona (e.g., Sagrada Família, Park Güell) that are fully wheelchair accessible.

task_list.name: accessible_beaches
task_list.text: Find accessible beaches in Barcelona with ramps, amphibious chairs, or specialized assistance for wheelchair users.

task_list.name: accessible_restaurants
task_list.text: Find local food restaurants in Barcelona that have step-free access and accessible restrooms.

task_list.name: opening_times_check
task_list.text: Verify the opening hours and accessibility-specific entry requirements for Sagrada Família and Park Güell for September 2026.

task_list.name: transit_feasibility
task_list.text: Check the accessibility of public transport (Metro/Bus) or specialized taxi services between the airport, hotel, and main attractions.

task_list.name: accessibility_research
task_list.text: Research general wheelchair accessibility standards and recent traveler reviews for Barcelona to ensure a seamless experience.
